steps.title: Use similar triangles
steps.content: The intersecting segments create vertical angles at $Q$, and the marked angles make the triangles similar. Match corresponding sides in triangles $WQX$ and $YQZ$.

steps.title: Set up the proportion
steps.content:
Using corresponding sides,
$$
\frac{WQ}{YQ}=\frac{WX}{YZ}
$$
Substitute the given lengths:
$$
\frac{70}{63}=\frac{60}{YZ}
$$

steps.title: Solve for the missing side
steps.content: Cross multiply and solve: $$ 70(YZ)=60\cdot 63 $$ $$ YZ=\frac{3{,}780}{70}=54 $$ The answer is 54.
